# Security

We value and encourage responsible reporting of security issues.

If you discover a vulnerability in any Magos project or have security
concerns, please contact us at [security@magosproject.io](mailto:security@magosproject.io).

If possible, include:

- Steps to reproduce
- Affected version or commit
- Impact summary

Some issues may be tagged with a bounty (see open issues labeled [bounty](https://github.com/magosproject/magos/issues?q=is:issue%20state:open%20label:bounty)).
For additional information about our bounty program, please see:
<https://magosproject.io/bounty>

For more details on Magos's security practices, visit
[https://magosproject.io/security](https://magosproject.io/security).

Thank you for helping keep the project safe.
